overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V featuring the character Franklin running from an urban street at night down to a waterfront, traversing rocky shoreline while observing the illuminated city skyline and moonlit water, then walking out onto a wooden pier. The scene transitions from artificial street lighting to natural moonlight with a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street transitioning to waterfront promenade

events.description: character runs from asphalt road onto concrete sidewalk along the waterfront
character transitions from paved sidewalk to dirt path along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: sprinting from a parked black van along the street and sidewalk toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street in the distance with headlights on

entered.detail: large black utility van parked on the street shoulder
tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows
illuminated street lamps casting orange light on the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character next to a black van on an urban street at night, illuminated by warm streetlights. The character runs along the sidewalk past palm trees and buildings, transitioning onto a dirt path along the waterfront as the distant city skyline becomes visible across the dark water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky waterfront shoreline with panoramic city view

events.description: character stops running and stands still on the rocks to observe the city skyline and full moon
character resumes running along the rocky terrain parallel to the water

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky shoreline, pausing to admire the moonlit cityscape across the bay, then continuing along the boulders

entered.detail: large granite boulders and rocks forming the water's edge
illuminated downtown skyscrapers with bright windows across the bay
large suspension bridge with illuminated towers spanning the water
bright full moon visible in the clear night sky casting reflection on water

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the rocky waterfront terrain under a clear night sky with a full moon. The illuminated city skyline and suspension bridge dominate the view across the dark water. The character stops to observe the scenery, standing on the boulders as moonlight reflects off the bay, then continues running along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shore leading to wooden pier structure

events.description: character steps from rocky terrain onto the wooden planks of a pier extending over the water

agents.ego_description: running along the rocky coast and transitioning onto a weathered wooden pier extending into the bay

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock structure with planks extending over the water
rusted metal railings along the sides of the pier
broken wooden structures and driftwood along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the rocky shore, passing wooden debris and bushes, then transitions onto a wooden pier. The perspective shifts as the character moves onto the dock, with the suspension bridge becoming more prominent in the center of the frame while the city skyline shifts to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending over open water

events.description: seagulls visible perched on the pier ahead as the character approaches the end
character stops at the end of the pier to look around at the surrounding water and views

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow wooden pier toward the end where seagulls are perched, then stopping to observe the panoramic view

notable_agents.action: seagulls standing on the wooden planks, some taking flight as the character approaches the end of the pier

entered.detail: large green metal utility box or equipment container on the pier
vertical wooden support posts at the edge of the pier structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the narrow wooden pier over dark water, passing a utility box and wooden pilings. Seagulls are perched on the planks ahead. At the end of the pier, the character stops to observe the panoramic view of the suspension bridge and illuminated city skyline across the moonlit bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a warm, urban street at night toward a moonlit waterfront and a distant city skyline. It begins beside a black van under artificial streetlights, moving past palm trees and buildings before transitioning onto a dirt path where the dark water and city lights first emerge. As the character moves onto the rocky shoreline, the lighting shifts to the cool glow of a full moon reflecting off the bay, with the camera pausing among boulders to observe a suspension bridge and the illuminated skyline. The scene then shifts from the rugged terrain of the shore, passing wooden debris and bushes, as the character steps onto a narrow wooden pier. Finally, the camera follows the character past utility boxes and perched seagulls to the end of the dock, settling on a panoramic view of the bridge and city across the moonlit water.
